Item Name: Dried White Turkish Figs by It’s Delish, 1 LB (16 Oz Bag) | White Turkish Golden Figs Dried Fruit for Gluten-Free Vegan Snacking | No Sugar Added, Kosher Naturally Sweet Figs Bullet Point 1: WHITE TURKISH FIGS: Enjoy the sweet nutty flavors of these dried Turkish figs; the all-natural taste of this sweet snack hits you with hints of vanilla and bourbon with a delightful silky yet crunchy texture. Bullet Point 2: DELICIOUS VEGAN SNACKS: These yummy dried white figs come in a bulk 1 lb bag for a natural vegan snack with no sugar added; make yummy treats out of these white figs or pair with other dried fruits and crackers to create a charming food spread. Bullet Point 3: KOSHER AND GLUTEN-FREE: These Smyrna Turkish figs this is certified kosher OU-parve and sorted in a facility that does not handle meat products; this treat is naturally gluten-free and low in sodium for easy snacking. Bullet Point 4: HIGH IN POTASSIUM: These dried Turkish figs are high in potassium, manganese, and calcium making a tasty yet healthy everyday treat; the amount of potassium and low sodium means these white figs often aid those with hypertension. Bullet Point 5: PACKED IN THE USA: A family-owned business based in California, It’s Delish produces gourmet goods including candies, nuts, fruits, trail mixes, and spices; for the past two decades, our company prides itself on innovation, quality, value, and service. Product Description:

White Dried Turkish Figs

Taste the delicious sweet notes of vanilla, nuts, and bourbon with each bite of the dried Turkish white figs by It’s Delish. Snack on these all-natural vegan treats. With no sugar added and completely gluten-free, these white Smyrna figs satisfy your cravings without any guilt. They are an excellent source of sodium, potassium, fiber, and nutrients. Great for vegetarian, vegan, raw diets and good for weight control. These white figs are certified kosher OU-parve and sorted in a facility that does not handle meat products. The bulk bag of Smyrna figs means you can use them to bake, snack, or even add to your salads. High in potassium and other healthy minerals, this snack often aids those with hypertension or who need a good source of minerals. Give this sweet snack to friends and family during movie nights, dinner parties, or other events. Try some today, you"ll be munching on these all the time!

About It's Delish!

It's Delish was established in 1992 and is located in North Hollywood, California. It's Delish is a food manufacturer and distributor who produces over 500 gourmet food products including licorice, sour belts, taffies, caramels, Jordan almonds, chocolates, nuts, fruits, trail mixes, spices, and the spice blends. It's Delish also produces organics and all natural products. We give you the opportunity to order from the factory direct!

It’s Delish! prides itself on the four pillars that are at the foundation of everything we do.

Item Name: Go Nutra Organic Freeze Dried Acai Berry Blend for Bowls | Superfood Smoothie Mix with 4 Immune Boosting Berries | Acai Maqui Elderberry Acerola | Antioxidant Freeze Dried Berries 15 Servings 8oz
Bullet Point 1: Supercharge your smoothies & acai bowls with our Super 4 Berry Blend! Our special blend is designed to streamline your smoothie making and contains 4 of nature’s most powerful berries! Get antioxidant support and boost your immunity wIth Acai, Maqui, Elderberry & Acerola.
Bullet Point 2: Freeze Dried Berries - Unlike other mixes, Super 4 is made from only freeze dried organic berries. Freeze drying is the best method to retain maximum nutrients, and maintain the great flavor of these superstar berries.
Bullet Point 3: Pure Organic Ingredients - No fillers, preservatives, or added sugars. USDA organic, non-GMO, vegan, gluten-free, keto friendly. Convenient superfood blend to supercharge your smoothies & Acai bowls. 15 servings per 8oz bag.
Bullet Point 4: Rich in Vitamins & Antioxidants - Bursting with Vitamin C & A, loaded with fiber and essential fatty acids, and chock full of natural antioxidants, polyphenol antioxidants and anthocyanins for antioxidant support and immune support.
Bullet Point 5: Antioxidant boost powder - This Acai superfood powder is a powerhouse immune system booster powder. | For immunity support, natural energy boost, longevity support.
Product Description: Super 4 Berry Blend is a "berry" delicious superfood powder, great for boosting your smoothies or shakes, or for making healthy supercharged Acai bowls! Containing not just organic Acai powder, but 3 other incredible superstar berries that together with Acai make it a powerful antioxidant boost powder and immune booster powder. These super berries are freeze dried, which is the very best method available to maintain the valuable nutrients. 4 of nature's most amazing and nutrient dense berries make up this berry superfood powder (Acai Powder Organic + Maqui Powder Organic + Elderberry Powder Organic + Acerola Powder Organic). Each of these berries alone are impressive, but are even better together! All four ingredients are sourced from South America. The Acai powder and Acerola cherry powder come from the Brazilian Amazon, and the Maqui and Elderberry come from the pristine mountains of Chile. All are freeze-dried to retain maximum nutrients, flavor and aroma and are certified organic and pure. We have not added any additional ingredients, no sugar, no preservatives - Just the pure goodness of these amazing berries! Super 4 Berry Blend is rich in vitamin C, an antioxidant that can enhance the immune system. Acerola and Elderberry are well-known for their immune boosting properties. Organic Acai Berry and Maqui contain loads of fiber & essential fatty acids. They are also rich in antioxidants like anthocyanins that help support vision & eye health. This is an incredible antioxidant rich superfood blend that can boost your overall health with just one serving per day! Each 8 Ounce Bag contains 15 Servings of 2 tbsp each. Easy to use! Simply add 2 tbsp to smoothies and shakes, or use to make frozen acai bowls. You can even sprinkle over yogurt or cereal or add to desserts. Freeze-dried, Pure, Organic, Non-GMO, Vegan.
Value: 8.0
Unit: Ounce
